description_long: This is a freestanding rectangular blackboard with a sturdy wooden frame and support structure. The writing surface is a classic matte green, typical of traditional chalkboards, and appears clean and unmarked. The frame is constructed from light-colored wood, featuring two wide legs with angled supports for stability. A horizontal wooden bar connects the legs near the base, adding further reinforcement. There is a small chalk holder or tray visible at the bottom right of the writing surface. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for use in classrooms, community centers, or outdoor educational events.
description: A freestanding rectangular blackboard with a light wooden frame, green writing surface, and a visible chalk tray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full green writing surface, wooden frame, and a small chalk holder at the bottom right.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blackboard and the depth of the wooden support structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden frame and support bars, with no writing surface visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thin profile and support structure.
attribute_frame_design: thick light wooden frame with rectangular legs and horizontal support bars
